metadataRefresh.datasetDiscoveryTooltip: How often Dremio will scan DynamoDB for new tables

elements.label: AWS Region
elements.tooltip: AWS region where your DynamoDB tables are located

elements.label: Endpoint Override
elements.tooltip: Override the DynamoDB endpoint URL. Use http://localhost:8000 for DynamoDB Local. Leave blank to connect to AWS DynamoDB.

elements.label: Access Key ID
elements.placeholder: Leave blank to use IAM / instance profile
elements.tooltip: AWS Access Key ID. Leave blank to use the default credential chain (IAM role, instance profile, environment variables).

elements.label: Secret Access Key
elements.tooltip: AWS Secret Access Key. Leave blank to use the default credential chain.

elements.label: Schema Sample Size
elements.tooltip: Number of items to sample per table for schema inference. Larger values improve accuracy but increase metadata refresh time (default 100).

elements.label: Split Parallelism
elements.tooltip: Number of parallel scan segments per table. Higher values increase throughput on large tables (default 4, max 1,000,000).

elements.label: Read Timeout (seconds)
elements.tooltip: AWS SDK call timeout in seconds (default 30).

elements.label: Page Size
elements.tooltip: Maximum number of items returned per DynamoDB Scan/Query page (default 1000).

elements.label: Schema Cache TTL (seconds)
elements.tooltip: How long (in seconds) to cache the inferred Arrow schema per table before re-sampling. Set to 0 to disable caching (default 60).
